review_questions: Does the compiler input bundle consume only approved semantic artifacts, operational indexes, review decisions, lock refs, validator evidence, control indexes, and schemas?
Does the bundle avoid direct semantic reads from source_prd.md and use it only as frozen source identity?
Are all input record groups list-shaped so malformed dict/string groups cannot bypass record validation?
Are the 33 semantic units atomic, source-bound, hash-bound, approval-bound, lock-bound, and referenced exactly once by compiled sections?
Does section ordering reject duplicate section IDs within a stage and duplicate stage/section order slots before FINAL_DRD assembly?
Does semantic_content_hash exist and bind sections and semantic units while closed_input_hash binds input records?
Does current_hashes cover every bundled input record and reject missing hash coverage as drift evidence?
Does FINAL_DRD.md exactly match deterministic compiler output from the bundle?
Does the conservation report show PASS with zero added, omitted, drifted, or unapproved units?
Does P2-IMPL-04 avoid creating final review artifacts, build locks, or P2-IMPL-05 outputs?
